# Messaging Brief: Generic B2B SaaS Workflow Automation

The workflow automation platform gives SaaS operations teams a faster way to coordinate workflow handoffs and spot process bottlenecks.

## Who this is for

Product: B2B workflow automation platform
Market: Mid-market SaaS operations teams
Locale: US
Geography: United States, Canada
Industry: Software, Professional services
Company size: 200-1000, 1000+
Companies: Northstar Software, Apex Systems
Target account lists: Tier 1 SaaS accounts
Job title: VP Operations, Director of Revenue Operations
Job function: Operations, Sales
Seniority: Director, VP
Skills: Revenue operations, Workflow automation

## Message inputs

Keywords: workflow automation software, revenue operations platform
Pain: manual handoffs
Gains: faster operational visibility
Objections: migration effort
Trigger: annual planning cycle

## Campaign controls

Exclusions: Current customers
Negative keywords: jobs, training
Suppression lists: active opportunities
Goal: qualified demo requests
Budget: $20,000
Primary conversion event: Qualified demo request
Measurement threshold: 30 qualified demo requests
Audience size requirements: 10,000 reachable members
Channels: linkedin-ads, google-ads-youtube, microsoft-ads
